model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The scheduled AdamW run underperformed, so the next clean test is a faster constant-LR Adam setup with less regularization to fit better within the fixed 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["indexing","caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 2","new":"DEPTH = 3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["micro"],"rationale":"The current run is likely still capacity-limited, so the next low-risk test is a slightly deeper and wider CNN while keeping the optimizer and budget behavior unchanged.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 3","new":"DEPTH = 2","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["layout"],"rationale":"The deeper/wider variant regressed, so revert to the better compact layout and do a small learning-rate downshift to see if the short 256-step run generalizes a bit better at the end.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"The previous lower step size slipped a bit, so this tests a slightly higher constant LR near the current apparent sweet spot without changing the rest of the winning setup.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":["indexing"],"rationale":"The current best is coming from the constant Adam setup, so the next low-risk probe is a small amount of weight decay to improve generalization without changing the training dynamics.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","secondary_modes":["topk"],"rationale":"The weight-decay probe hurt, so the next minimal change is to make Adam a bit more responsive by lowering beta2, which is often better for short fixed-step runs.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.2e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["indexing"],"rationale":"The current setup looks close to a good basin, so this tests a small upward LR nudge to keep the short Adam run a bit more aggressive while preserving the improved optimizer settings.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.05e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["indexing"],"rationale":"The last step was a bit too aggressive, so this backs the constant Adam rate off slightly to probe the narrower optimum around the current best run.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.05e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["indexing"],"rationale":"The slight LR reduction lost ground, so this restores the better constant step size that previously produced the best visible loss.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":["indexing"],"rationale":"The best run still looks lightly regularized, so this tests a small upward move in weight decay while keeping the winning optimizer and learning-rate settings fixed.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()","new":"criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.05)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":["micro"],"rationale":"The best run is already stable, so a small label-smoothing probe is a low-risk way to improve validation loss without changing the learned optimization recipe.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.05)","new":"criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":["caching"],"rationale":"The smoothing and heavier regularization regressed, so this rolls those back to the best-known optimizer settings and probes a larger batch to get more data per fixed update.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":["topk"],"rationale":"The larger batch already produced a large gain, so this tests whether another step up in per-update data can further reduce validation loss within the same fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 96","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["micro"],"rationale":"The batch-size increase clearly helped optimization, so the next plausible bottleneck is capacity; this widens the compact CNN a bit while keeping the successful optimizer and batch setting intact.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 96","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["micro"],"rationale":"The wider 16/96 model improved a lot, which suggests the run is still capacity-limited; this pushes width a bit further while keeping the successful optimizer and batch size fixed.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 2","new":"DEPTH = 3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 128","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 96","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["micro"],"rationale":"The extra width did not help, so the next structural test is a deeper stack at the best-known width to see whether more feature extraction improves validation loss.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 96","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["micro"],"rationale":"The 3-block model is clearly better, so the next test is a modest width increase to see whether the deeper backbone is still capacity-limited.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 20","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 128","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 160","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["micro"],"rationale":"The deeper model is still improving as it widens, so this is the final capacity probe: a modest bump in channels and head size while preserving the winning depth, batch size, and optimizer settings.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 28","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 160","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 192","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["micro"],"rationale":"The deeper model is still benefiting from added width, so the final probe is a modest further capacity increase at the same depth and batch size to see if the loss can dip again.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}
